## Summary

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup
- [ ] i18n / translation update

## How has this been tested?

Describe the testing you performed to verify the changes:
- [ ] `cargo check` — Rust compiles without warnings
- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` — TypeScript compiles without errors
- [ ] `npm run tauri build` — release build succeeds
- [ ] Tested on Windows version: [e.g. Windows 11 23H2]
- [ ] Verified with real target application(s): [e.g. Chrome, Premiere Pro, game X]

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style and conventions
- [ ] I have updated the i18n translations (en/ru) if UI strings changed
- [ ] I have tested the change both as a release build
- [ ] I have verified that the app still passes the Safety checks (RawInput, Anti-Cheat) when applicable

## Screenshots (if UI change)

If the change affects the user interface, include before/after screenshots.
